infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WashingBells Rider needs your location to assign nearby trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: WashingBells Rider tracks your location while you are online so customers and store can see your live position.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WashingBells uses the camera to photograph laundry items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WashingBells needs photo library access to upload item images.
